query:
SELECT 
    p.name as partner_name,
    c.name as city_name,
    pc.contractStatus,
    pc.brandUsageFee,
    pc.managementFee
FROM partner_cities pc
JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.name = '张浩炜' AND c.name = '郑州';
